message:
fix(types): resolve TypeScript errors across test files (xm6c)

Fixed type compatibility issues across multiple test files:

- agents.test.ts: Align OperatorResults objects with LevelSplitResult,
  ExclusionTestResult, ObjectTransposeResult, ScaleCheckResult schemas;
  add proper task typing with AgentTask import
- session-machine.test.ts: Update PendingAgentRequest (threadId+role),
  AgentResponse (role+threadId+messageId+summary), and EvidenceEntry
  (testId+observation+recordedBy) objects to match current interfaces
- operators.test.ts: Add OperatorSession and LevelSplitResult type imports;
  cast PlausibilityRating.evidenceDiscrimination to union type
- undoManager.test.ts: Add required recordedBy field to EvidenceEntry
- QueryProvider.test.tsx: Wrap non-serializable query options in String()
- command-palette.test.tsx: Fix useRouter mock typing with proper cast
- agentMail.test.ts: Cast capturedHeaders to fix flow analysis issue
- artifact-merge.test.ts: Cast invalid payload for error-testing scenario
- comparison.test.ts: Import ComparisonField type for invalid field test
- storage.test.ts: Remove obsolete HypothesisCard fields, keep createdAt/updatedAt
- delta-parser.test.ts: Cast payload to access context property

All 160 test files pass (4292 tests).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
